description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MSYS2 Build that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow should run on a windows-latest environment, set up MSYS2 with the CLANG64 system, and use the MSYS2 shell. It should check out the repository with submodules, install various packages including mingw-w64-clang-x86_64-toolchain, ffmpeg, cmake, and others, then configure, build, and install the project using cmake and ninja.
